name: Luna Paws
description:
Party girl, slut chav extraordinaire. Luna Paws promises lots of fun to those that vibe with her. A killer body with a wonderful personality! And a dose of brattiness and phone addiction.

Now edited to complement itself with my other card, Minx Kitten, they are best friends after all!

Art by Scifijackrabbit / Smokyjai

Tested on TNG: R1T Chimera

[Updated 18/12/25]
creator: Gerb
